content.text:
```mdl
@ Non‑Disclosure Agreement – Clause‑level model
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_7_nda_7

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2.1(c) – permitted recipients of Confidential Information
type Role =
    | Employee
    | Director
    | Servant
    | Agent
    | Officer
    | Representative
    | Consultant
    | IndependentContractor
    | ProfessionalAdvisor

@ Clause 1.2(a) – parties to the agreement
type Party = { name: string }

@ Clause 1.2(a) – definition of Confidential Information
type ConfidentialInformation = {
    source: Party,          # the Discloser (AHPL)
    content: string,
    is_confidential: bool
}

@ Clause 2.1(c) – third‑party entities that may receive Confidential Information
type ThirdParty = {
    party: Party,
    role: Role,
    purpose: string,               # should be the “Purpose” defined in Clause 1.1
    signed_confidentiality: bool   # bound by a confidentiality obligation
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Parties to the agreement
entity receiving_party: Party          # the Company
entity disclosing_party: Party         # ALEXANDRA HEALTH PTE LTD (AHPL)

@ The Confidential Information that is being exchanged
entity confidential_info: ConfidentialInformation

@ A concrete third‑party that may be disclosed to
entity third_party: ThirdParty

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper functions
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2.1(c) – check whether a role is one of the permitted categories
func is_permitted_role(r: Role) -> bool:
    case r:
        | Role.Employee: true
        | Role.Director: true
        | Role.Servant: true
        | Role.Agent: true
        | Role.Officer: true
        | Role.Representative: true
        | Role.Consultant: true
        | Role.IndependentContractor: true
        | Role.ProfessionalAdvisor: true
        | _: false

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules (deontic constraints)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2.1(c) – Permission to disclose Confidential Information to permitted third‑parties
rule P disclose_to_permitted_roles:
    is_permitted_role(third_party.role) and
    third_party.purpose = "Purpose" and
    third_party.signed_confidentiality always

@ Clause 2.1(c) – Prohibition to disclose Confidential Information to non‑permitted parties
rule F disclose_to_unpermitted_roles:
    not (is_permitted_role(third_party.role) and
         third_party.purpose = "Purpose" and
         third_party.signed_confidentiality) always

@ Clause 2.1(a) – Obligation to keep Confidential Information confidential
rule O keep_confidential_always:
    confidential_info.is_confidential always

@ Clause 2.1(b) – Obligation to return or destroy Confidential Information on request
rule O return_or_destroy_on_request:
    (confidential_info.is_confidential implies true) always   # placeholder – actual return logic is external

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# End of module
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
```
